# GoTimer.org

> Free online timers for board games, productivity, workouts, studying, and more.

Last updated: 2026-04-09

## What is GoTimer?

GoTimer is a free, mobile-friendly web application providing distraction-free timers for a wide range of activities. It currently offers three timer types and a challenge tracking system for competitive play. No app download required — works in any modern web browser at https://gotimer.org.

## Timers

### Countdown Timer
- URL: https://gotimer.org/countdown-setup
- Duration: 1 second to 60 minutes, fully configurable
- Features: Preset buttons (10s, 15s, 30s, 60s), slider for custom duration, audio alerts during last 10 seconds and at zero
- Best for: Board game turns, trivia rounds, ADHD focus sessions, Pomodoro technique, cooking, workouts, presentations, speed puzzles
- Recommended settings: 30-60s for party games (Codenames, Taboo), 60-90s for strategy games (Catan, Ticket to Ride), 25m for Pomodoro/ADHD focus blocks

### Chess Clock
- URL: https://gotimer.org/chess-clock-setup
- Duration: 10 seconds to 60 minutes per player
- Features: Two independent countdowns, tap to switch turns, preset durations (2m, 5m, 10m, 20m, 30m, 60m)
- Best for: Chess, Scrabble, Go, Blokus, Hive, Patchwork, 7 Wonders Duel, any two-player turn-based game
- Recommended settings: 5m blitz chess, 25m tournament Scrabble, 10-20m casual board games

### Round Timer
- URL: https://gotimer.org/round-timer-setup
- Type: Count-up timer (no limit)
- Features: Tracks total elapsed time + individual round durations, round reset button, round history log
- Best for: Tournament play, Twilight Imperium, Terraforming Mars, Gloomhaven, Pomodoro focus tracking, any activity where you want to track round/session pacing

## Coming Soon

GoTimer is expanding beyond board games into a comprehensive timer platform. Specialized timers in development:

- **Pomodoro / Productivity**: 25/5 minute focus-break cycles with session tracking
- **HIIT / Workout**: Configurable work/rest intervals for exercise routines
- **Meditation / Breathing**: Guided breathing intervals and meditation sessions
- **Cooking Timers**: Multiple simultaneous timers for complex recipes
- **Study Timers**: Timed study blocks with subject tracking
- **Classroom Timers**: Teacher-friendly timers for activities and transitions
- **ADHD Focus**: Structured focus sessions designed for attention management

## Challenge Tracking

GoTimer lets players create competitive challenges to track game results over time:

- Create a challenge for any board game
- Invite opponents via shareable links
- Log game results (wins, losses, draws)
- View score history with visual charts
- Add GIF reactions to game results
- Make challenges public to share with the community
- URL: https://gotimer.org/public-challenges

## Who Is GoTimer For?

- Board game enthusiasts who need timers for game nights
- Chess players looking for a free online chess clock
- Tournament organizers tracking round times
- Friends who want to track competitive game records
- People using Pomodoro technique for productivity
- Individuals with ADHD who benefit from structured focus sessions
- Students using timed study blocks to stay on task
- Athletes and fitness enthusiasts timing HIIT or workout intervals
- People who meditate or practice breathing exercises
- Home cooks who need multiple simultaneous timers
- Teachers managing classroom activities and transitions
- Anyone needing a simple, distraction-free timer

## Key Features

- No account required for timers (account needed for challenge tracking)
- Works on mobile phones, tablets, and desktop browsers
- Audio alerts and sound effects
- Shareable public challenges with score visualizations
- Free to use with no ads

## Pages

- Home: https://gotimer.org
- Countdown Timer: https://gotimer.org/countdown-setup
- Chess Clock: https://gotimer.org/chess-clock-setup
- Round Timer: https://gotimer.org/round-timer-setup
- Public Challenges: https://gotimer.org/public-challenges
- Privacy Policy: https://gotimer.org/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://gotimer.org/terms-of-service
- Sitemap: https://gotimer.org/sitemap.xml
